content:
> 我聽歌從不在意歌詞，只專注旋律，把歌手的音色當作一部樂器來聽。🎼

> I never care about the lyrics when listening to music. I focus solely on the melody, treating the singer’s voice as just another instrument. 🎼

> “The limits of my language are the limits of my world”—Ludwig Wittgen-stein (1889-1951)

> “我的语言的界限就是我的世界的界限。”——路德维希·维特根斯坦（Ludwig Wittgenstein，1889-1951）
